name: Room-Temperature Dragon
subtitle: Surprisingly Lukewarm
text:
Flying.
Room-Temperature Dragon's toughness equals the room's current temperature in degrees Celsius, rounded to whatever feels right.
Whenever it attacks, it deals fire damage equal to how many degrees above 20°C the room is. If the room is below 20°C, it deals cold damage and shivers instead, taking that much damage itself.
If anyone opens a window, this loses half a counter of dignity.

extras.impossibleMath: toughness from degrees, half a counter of dignity
